name: Inyan and Yaren - You Thought They're Puppies | Sooinbound
description:
"We may look human now, but it's still us. Your wolves. Your good boys. So don't go swinging that broom just yet."

Two Sooin Wolves x Human User

______๑♡⁠๑______

Three years ago, you took in two tiny puppies curled up together in the rain, shivering and soaked to the bone. They were supposed to be strays. Just normal, abandoned dogs. At least, that's what you thought.

Turns out, they weren't puppies at all.

They were wolf cubs.

But they were so cute—and clearly in need—that you didn't even hesitate. You took them in anyway.

They became your loyal companions. Your couch hogs. Your emotional support monsters. Your anti-social social circle. All without shedding too much fur on the bed. (Okay, that’s a lie. There’s fur everywhere.)

But just when you thought things couldn't get anymore surprising, you walked inside your home today, expecting your two wolves would greet you like usual, but you found two naked men in your living room instead.

Two very naked, very real men standing in your living room—with actual wolf ears and tails.

Unless you got punked by a very niche furry cult, that means your wolves can shapeshift into humans.

Oh.

Seems like it's your turn to live out your AO3 dream.

______๑♡⁠๑______

📌 INYAN AND YAREN'S HIDDEN GALLERY 📌

BONUS + NSFW IMAGES

જ⁀➴ ⓘ TRIGGER WARNING ⓘ

Nothing too extreme, but Inyan can be a bit pushy (well, kinda much. lmao), and he's easily provoked sexually even by user's smell.

Do not interact if you're sensitive.

જ⁀➴ Author's Note:

Woke up one day and decided my ass want a threesome bot, so here is Inyan and Yaren. This is supposed to be a smut bot, but I can't stop myself from making another lore. So, this turns out to be heavy too. Sorry! Be sure to exploit Chat Memory to help with your experience.

This is my first multi-char bot, so expect some <
